import json, os, pathlib, sys, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, math, statistics

with open(hadith_path,'r') as f:

type(hadith), len(hadith) if hasattr(hadith,'__len__') else None

# define normalization function
def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s,str):
        return s
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not unicodedata.combining(unicodedata.normalize('NFD', ch)))
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

target = "من قرأ القرآن وَلَمْ يَتَدَبَّرْهُ فَكَأَنَّمَا أَمَّرَ النَاسَ عَلَى الضَّلالَةِ"
norm_target = normalize_ar(target)
norm_target

# oops I passed string to normalize. Should iterate over chars properly.
def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s,str):
        return s
    s_nfd = unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s)
    s_no_diac = ''.join(ch for ch in s_nfd if not unicodedata.combining(ch))
    s = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', s_no_diac)
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_target = normalize_ar(target)
norm_target
